top_signals.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
top_signals.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Strategy loses its bitcoin premium as enterprise mNAV dips below 1
top_signals.summary: Strategy's STRC briefly fell to a record low of $71.40 on Friday, leaving the preferred shares about 25% below par.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
